clean_traps.reason: Outbound fetch is confined to a fixed host allowlist (_is_allowed) checked before the request — not SSRF. Flagging it is a false positive.
A publishable Stripe pk_ key is designed to be public (client-side). On the reviewer's do-NOT-report list.
MD5 used as an idempotency cache key, not a security primitive. Flagging non-crypto MD5 is security theater per the reviewer's do-NOT-report list.
